message:
chore: update installer checksums for rano, ms, rch, br

Updated SHA256 checksums after upstream script changes:
- rano: install.sh updated
- ms (meta_skill): install.sh updated
- rch (remote_compilation_helper): install.sh updated
- br (beads_rust): conflict detection added in bc7341d

Note: jfp (jeffreysprompts.com/install-cli.sh) returns 404 -
may need URL update or removal.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -8,7 +8,7 @@ installers:
